2026-03-25IRCCImmigration and Refugee Protection ActAppointment of the full-time member of the Immigration and Refugee Board (Toronto Regional Office)Appointment of Lauren Riverso of Toronto, Ontario, to be a full-time member of the Immigration and Refugee Board (Toronto Regional Office), to hold office during good behaviour for a term of five years, effective June 18, 2026.N/A
subject: Appointment of the full-time member of the Immigration and Refugee Board (Toronto Regional Office)
precis: Appointment of Lauren Riverso of Toronto, Ontario, to be a full-time member of the Immigration and Refugee Board (Toronto Regional Office), to hold office during good behaviour for a term of five years, effective June 18, 2026.
